prompt: I'm a health coach at ClearPath Wellness. I have a first consult tomorrow with Sandra Okafor...[full prompt in evals.json]

assertions.text: Produces a .docx file named with Sandra or Okafor and ConversationPrep
Sanity check is present and acknowledges the cost sensitivity as a partial fit concern
Section 1 Human Snapshot contains no clinical jargon — plain language throughout
Probe questions include at least 2 that address previous attempts gently (not making her feel like a failure)
Reframe section addresses the food-as-culture identity stake
CTA ladder is used at Readiness 2 or 3 (not a hard sell on the program at first consult)
Plain language brief present and readable by someone with no psychology background
